ST. CLOUD DIVERSITY COUNCIL
2025 Winter Gift Drive
Supporting families across West Orange who could use
a little extra joy this holiday season!

NOVEMBER REMINDERS
Grade Level Food Drive
Monday, November 17-21, 2025
 (send with student or bring to parent teacher conference)
Ruby Bridges Day- Join us for the walk
November 14, 2025 at 9:30am
NO School:  November 6, 7, 27, 28
Early Dismissal: November 4, 18, 19,  20, 26
Parent/Teacher Conference: November 18-20
PTA Meeting 
Join us and let your voice be heard  
November 12th 8pm on Zoom
Parent Volunteer Signup for Bookfair 
Be on the lookout to volunteer at the bookfair during your child's class.  E-Wallet
opens so that you can add money to your child's  account. 
   November 10th
